case_title: NASIR PATEL VS. JASON MICHEAL WALDROP

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN LIU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT WALDROP, JASON MICHEAL
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR SERVED MAY-08-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WALDROP, JASON MICHEAL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALDROP, JASON MICHEAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PARK HOTEL 1040 FOLSOM ST. S.F. CA. 94103 ROOM NO.34, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( NO ENVELOPE, PLACE IN THE PICK-UP BOX )
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR AS TO DEFENDANT WALDROP, JASON MICHEAL SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WALDROP, JASON MICHEAL
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WALDROP, JASON MICHEAL
